description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 11 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 39 mins. His coding was mostly in Java (64%), with Markdown (22%) and Other (13%) making up the rest. The activity data does not list any public GitHub commits, repos, or pull requests this week.
